license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.syeefte
title: Immunofluorescence staining protocol for co-staining of fetuin-A and GFAP in older human autopsy tissue via Tyramide Signal Amplification
author: Miriam Heinen

steps_raw.instruction: Place slides in hybridization oven: 37°C overnight, then 1 hour at 65°C
Deparaffination in xylene 3x20 minutes (different containers) on a shaker
Rehydration in graded ethanol: 3x2 minutes in 100% ethanol, followed by 2x2 minutes in 96% ethanol and at last 2 minutes in 70% ethanol
Wash in PBS for 5 minutes
Antigen retrieval in citrate buffer (10 mM, pH 6) in a heat steamer for 30 minutes. Afterwards let the slides cool down in PBS for 30 minutes
Wash in PBS for 5 minutes
Encircle tissue section with wax pen
To block non-specific binding, apply a solution of 10% goat serum in PBS, incubation for 1 hour in a moisture chamber

Tip off excess solution and apply the primary antibodies MAHS-1 (dilution 1 µg/ml) and Anti-GFAP (dilution 1:50) in 1% BSA in PBS, 100 µl per section (negative controls: only 1% dilution), incubation overnight in a moisture chamber
Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes

Apply the secondary antibodies: biotinylated goat-anti-mouse antibody (dilution 1:300) and polyclonal goat-anti-rabbit Alexa Fluor® 488 conjugated secondary antibody (dilution 1:300), both in 1% of BSA in PBS, 100 µl per section, incubation for 90 minutes at room temperature in a moisture chamber. keep the tissue samples from now on light protected!
Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes

Apply the Tyramide Signal Amplification Kit as follows: Dilute the prior prepared HRP solution 1:100 in 1% BSA in PBS, apply 100 µl per section, incubation for 1 hour at room temperature in a moisture chamber.
Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes
Prepare a tyramide working solution following the manufacturer’s protocol: dilute the prior prepared tyramide stock solution 1:100 in the prepared 0.0015% hydrogen peroxid solution
Apply 100 µl per section, incubation for 10 minutes
Tip off excess solution and rinse in demineralized water
Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes
To minimize lipofuscin autofluorescence, perform counterstaining with Sudan Black (dilution 0.3% in 70% ethanol) for 5 minutes
Rinse the container with demineralized water until the solution becomes clear and colorless
Wash in demineralized water for 3x5 minutes
Counterstain with DAPI (dilution 0.25 µg/ml) for 5 minutes
Wash in PBS for 3x5 minutes
Coverslip using mounting medium
store at 8°C in the dark
Prepare the components of the Tyramide Signal Amplification Kit
